name: Chocolate-Chip Mint Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 package Instant Vanilla Pudding Mix (3-3/4 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat eggs until blended.
2. Gradually beat in sugar until thick and lemon-colored.
3. Beat in vanilla pudding and evaporated milk until blended.
4. Microwave chocolate until melted or melt over hot water.
5. Stir constantly while slowly pouring the hot melted chocolate into the egg mixture.
6. Add chopped mints and half and half.
7. Cool to room temperature.
8. Pour into an ice cream canister.
9. Freeze in an ice cream maker according to manufacturer's directions.
10. Makes 2 quarts.
